title: Cobblemon Catch Level Cap
description: Cobblemon plugin that adds a configuarable level cap for catching Pokemon.
body:
A simple plugin to prevent players from catching Pokemon too far above their current level. Any catch attempt on a Pokemon that is X levels above the player's current highest level Pokemon in their party will not succeed.

Features:

- Two separate level caps for in-battle and out of battle capturing
- Gamerules for configuration: levelCap, externalLevelCap, showLevelCapMessages
- Level cap is ignored if player is in **creative**, is using a **masterball**, or the target Pokemon is **shiny**!

Find me in the official Cobblemon Discord if there's any issues with the mod!
